Weekend trip

Hotels for a Weekend in Trier

Check-in 17/07/2026 Check-out 19/07/2026 2 nights

Trier next weekend? Here are the current live prices for the classic two-night program between Porta Nigra (the Black Gate) and the Moselle.

The classic Trier weekend: arrive Friday evening, UNESCO tour on Saturday, Olewig or the Moselle cycle path on Sunday, and head home Sunday afternoon. Here you can see prices and availability for the next available weekend.

Trier, älteste Stadt Deutschlands. UNESCO-Welterbe, Mosel-Wein, römisches Erbe - Sehenswürdigkeiten, Hotels, Reise-Guides auf einem Portal.
